version_description: This is based on the studio version (2023/11).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
I don't like no whips and chains and you can't tie me down[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
But you can whip your lovin' on me, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Whip your lovin' on me, baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
I'm vanilla, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
I'll choke you, but I ain't no killa, baby[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
She twenty-eight, tellin' me I'm still a baby[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I get love in Detroit like Skilla Baby[/tab]

And the thing about ya boy is
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
I don't like no whips and chains and you can't tie me down[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]

That's right, that's right
[tab][ch]C[/ch]

N.C.
Young J-A-C-K, AKA Rico, like Suave, Young Enrique
Speakin' of AKA, she's a alpha
But not around ya boy
She get quiet 'round ya boy, hold on (Shh)
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Don't know what you heard or what you thought about ya boy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
But they lied about ya boy[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Goin' dumb, man, it's some' idi-otic 'bout ya boy[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
She wearin' cheetah print[/tab]
That's how bad she wanna bе spotted 'round ya boy

N.C.
Young M-I-S-S-I-O-N-A-R-Y
He's sharp like barbed wire
She stole my heart, then she got archived
I keep it short with a bitch, Lord Farquaad
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
 All the girls in the front row (Aye)[/tab]

 If you came with a man (Yeah, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody in the suite, kickin' up they feet[/tab]

Stand up, bitch, dance (I see you)
